name: Beef Stew# 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the stew meat into the crockpot.
2. Add the peas, carrots, potatoes, salt, pepper, parsley, and either a bay leaf or both cans of soup.
3. Stir to combine all ingredients.
4. Cook on low for 8-10 hours, or until the vegetables are tender.
5. If desired, transfer the mixture to a preheated oven at 275 degrees Fahrenheit and cook for an additional 5 hours.
